boundary_binding.action_boundary: May order operations release the tax-exempt sale?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No exact match; pending certificate blocks closure.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: CERT-JAD-090 defect remains open before execution.

final_answer: The action may not proceed. Source records show exemption certificate TX-44 remains pending (CERT-JAD-090), creating an unresolved status-class dependency before execution. The policy (STD-JAD-090-P) requires exemption-status class to be fully resolved before sale. WARN-JAD-090 confirms verification requirement. Since TX-44 status is pending, the source boundary remains open, blocking authorization. Escalation required to address this critical defect.
